mapper.select: SELECT ts.course_id AS course_courseId, c.title AS course_title, ts.date AS testSchedule_date, ts.title AS testSchedule_title FROM test_schedule ts JOIN course c ON ts.course_id = c.course_id WHERE ts.date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND ts.date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ORDER BY ts.date ASC

SELECT cc.class_id AS courseClass_classId, cc.class_name AS courseClass_className, ct.time_code AS courseTime_timeCode, ct.start_time AS courseTime_startTime, ct.end_time AS courseTime_endTime, c.start_date AS course_startDate, c.end_date AS course_endDate, c.title AS course_title FROM course_class cc JOIN course c ON cc.class_id = c.class_id JOIN course_time ct ON c.time_code = ct.time_code WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = 'S'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = 'i'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_userinfo WHERE DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')
SELECT notice_id as notice_noticeId, title as notice_title, reg_date as notice_regDate FROM notice WHERE DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY notice_id DESC

SELECT s.survey_id AS survey_id, s.title AS survey_title, s.view_count AS Survey_viewCount, s.created_at AS survey_createAt FROM survey s WHERE DATE_FORMAT(s.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

SELECT q.post_id AS qnaPost_postId, q.title AS qnaPost_title, q.answer_status AS qnaPost_answerStatus, q.created_at AS qnaPost_createAt FROM qna_post q WHERE q.answer_status = 'N' AND DATE_FORMAT(q.created_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
